title: leontodon officinalis
intro: Leontodon officinalis, also known as Hawkbit or Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family with yellow flowers and jagged leaf margins. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting liver function. In herbal preparations, Leontodon officinalis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its potential medicinal and therapeutic effects.
